title: lasianthus panamensis
intro: Lasianthus panamensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the tea family, and is native to Panama. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Lasianthus panamensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus panamensis can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
